title: Mientras and al mismo tiempo
subtitle: Talk about simultaneous actions.
overview: Al mismo tiempo means at the same time.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: While I cook, I listen to music.
I was studying while I was waiting.
At the same time, I practiced pronunciation.

items.en: I listen to Spanish while I walk.

items.es: Ayer estudiaba mientras esperaba el autobús.
items.en: Yesterday I was studying while I was waiting for the bus.

items.es: Ana cocinaba mientras hablaba por teléfono.
items.en: Ana was cooking while she was talking on the phone.

items.es: Trabajo y estudio al mismo tiempo.
items.en: I work and study at the same time.
While I was reading, I wrote new words.
